free_text: Energy dependence of Na22 and Na24 production cross
Cumulative production of Na22 and Na24 was measured.
Authors estimate that at least 90% of it are due to
mainly from trace quantities of the low-Z elements
added to COMMON. BIB update, BIB moved to appropriate
data sets.  Converted to lower case.
OS. REACTION SF5=CUM added to all
subentries except #3, added explanation under METHOD,
MONITOR coding changed, minor BIB changes
Mg pellet, 90% H3BO3, 10% MgO, spectroscopically pure
A blank activity due to the boric acid was measured,
and the contribution to the Na22 was corrected.
